## Meeting Purpose

[Introduce Abnormal AI's email security solution to GrowthX AI and explore potential fit for their needs.](https://fathom.video/share/CRmiNiunfxvGNSwC5k-4PXZxR_YApttA?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX (75 employees) seeks email security for SOC2 compliance; experiencing basic phishing attempts](https://fathom.video/share/CRmiNiunfxvGNSwC5k-4PXZxR_YApttA?tab=summary&timestamp=76.0)
  - [Abnormal offers AI-driven protection against advanced threats, account compromise, and spam without traditional gateway](https://fathom.video/share/CRmiNiunfxvGNSwC5k-4PXZxR_YApttA?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Pricing starts at $25K minimum; official quote/pricing to be provided through GrowthX's preferred partner (GuidePoint Security)](https://fathom.video/share/CRmiNiunfxvGNSwC5k-4PXZxR_YApttA?tab=summary&timestamp=1757.0)
  - [GrowthX interested in evaluating; potential Q4 timeline for decision (likely November)](https://fathom.video/share/CRmiNiunfxvGNSwC5k-4PXZxR_YApttA?tab=summary&timestamp=2221.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Current Security Posture

  - [75 employees (100 total mailboxes including shared)](https://fathom.video/share/CRmiNiunfxvGNSwC5k-4PXZxR_YApttA?tab=summary&timestamp=410.0)
  - [Using Google Workspace with native security features](https://fathom.video/share/CRmiNiunfxvGNSwC5k-4PXZxR_YApttA?tab=summary&timestamp=659.0)
  - [Implementing Okta for MFA, Sentinel One for EDR/MDR](https://fathom.video/share/CRmiNiunfxvGNSwC5k-4PXZxR_YApttA?tab=summary&timestamp=674.0)
  - [Experiencing basic phishing/impersonation attempts, but no major breaches](https://fathom.video/share/CRmiNiunfxvGNSwC5k-4PXZxR_YApttA?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Finance team adept at spotting invoice fraud attempts](https://fathom.video/share/CRmiNiunfxvGNSwC5k-4PXZxR_YApttA?tab=summary&timestamp=573.0)

### Abnormal AI Solution Overview

  - [API-based integration with Google Workspace (no gateway required)](https://fathom.video/share/CRmiNiunfxvGNSwC5k-4PXZxR_YApttA?tab=summary&timestamp=1635.0)
  - [Core offering: Inbound Email Security against advanced threats](https://fathom.video/share/CRmiNiunfxvGNSwC5k-4PXZxR_YApttA?tab=summary&timestamp=800.0)
  - [Add-ons: Account Compromise protection, AI Security Mailbox, Graymail management](https://fathom.video/share/CRmiNiunfxvGNSwC5k-4PXZxR_YApttA?tab=summary&timestamp=811.0)
  - [New AI Phishing Coach feature for user training (details TBD)](https://fathom.video/share/CRmiNiunfxvGNSwC5k-4PXZxR_YApttA?tab=summary&timestamp=1177.0)
  - [Behavioral AI analyzes 43,000+ signals per email for context-aware protection](https://fathom.video/share/CRmiNiunfxvGNSwC5k-4PXZxR_YApttA?tab=summary&timestamp=1472.0)
  - [7-day risk assessment offered to demonstrate value with minimal customer effort](https://fathom.video/share/CRmiNiunfxvGNSwC5k-4PXZxR_YApttA?tab=summary&timestamp=1774.0)

### Technical Integration & User Experience

  - [Quick API integration with Google Workspace (minutes to set up)](https://fathom.video/share/CRmiNiunfxvGNSwC5k-4PXZxR_YApttA?tab=summary&timestamp=1754.0)
  - [No quarantine or user digest emails; suspicious emails moved to deletions folder](https://fathom.video/share/CRmiNiunfxvGNSwC5k-4PXZxR_YApttA?tab=summary&timestamp=1528.0)
  - [False positives can be reported by admins for re-analysis and model improvement](https://fathom.video/share/CRmiNiunfxvGNSwC5k-4PXZxR_YApttA?tab=summary&timestamp=1542.0)
  - [Integrates with existing security stack (Okta, Sentinel One) via REST API](https://fathom.video/share/CRmiNiunfxvGNSwC5k-4PXZxR_YApttA?tab=summary&timestamp=674.0)

### Pricing and Partnership

  - [$25K minimum annual contract, specific per-user pricing to be provided](https://fathom.video/share/CRmiNiunfxvGNSwC5k-4PXZxR_YApttA?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
  - [Typically sold through channel partners; GuidePoint Security identified as GrowthX's preferred reseller](https://fathom.video/share/CRmiNiunfxvGNSwC5k-4PXZxR_YApttA?tab=summary&timestamp=1965.0)
  - [Official quote to be provided through Tom Wish at GuidePoint Security](https://fathom.video/share/CRmiNiunfxvGNSwC5k-4PXZxR_YApttA?tab=summary&timestamp=2036.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marilyn to send follow-up email with meeting recap and security documentation](https://fathom.video/share/CRmiNiunfxvGNSwC5k-4PXZxR_YApttA?tab=summary&timestamp=2269.0)
  - [Marilyn to contact Tom Wish at GuidePoint Security for official quote](https://fathom.video/share/CRmiNiunfxvGNSwC5k-4PXZxR_YApttA?tab=summary&timestamp=2137.0)
  - [Schedule call with Marilyn, Tom, and Yousef to review detailed pricing](https://fathom.video/share/CRmiNiunfxvGNSwC5k-4PXZxR_YApttA?tab=summary&timestamp=2151.0)
  - [Potentially set up 7-day risk assessment pending pricing discussions](https://fathom.video/share/CRmiNiunfxvGNSwC5k-4PXZxR_YApttA?tab=summary&timestamp=1774.0)
  - [GrowthX to internally discuss timeline and budget for Q4 (likely November) decision](https://fathom.video/share/CRmiNiunfxvGNSwC5k-4PXZxR_YApttA?tab=summary&timestamp=2221.0)
